word: H1255 - בְּרֹאדַךְ בַּלְאֲדָן - Bᵉrôʼdak Balʼădân - ber-o-dak' bal-ad-awn' - Berodach-baladan

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּראדך בּלאדן

Transliteration: berô'dak bal'ădân

Phonetic: ber-o-dak' bal-ad-awn'

BDB Definition:

Berodach-baladan = "worshipper of Baal"
  1. king of Babylon in the days of Hezekiah

Origin: a variation of H4757

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
